entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet

[DQC.US.0179.10143] The filing has used the DividendsAxis with the member bxp:ReturnOfCapitalMember, but has used the concept bxp:DividendsTreatmentForFederalTaxPurposes multiple times on this axis with different period contexts. The concept bxp:DividendsTreatmentForFederalTaxPurposes has been used mutiple times to capture the values 0.4 and 0 and 0 for the periods 2024-01-01 to 2024-12-31 and 2025-01-01 to 2025-12-31 and 2023-01-01 to 2023-12-31. The DividendAxis should use discrete members to represent different dividend events. The same concept should not be used more than once with the same dividend member bxp:ReturnOfCapitalMember.
Rule Element Id:10143 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - bxp-20251231.htm 8

property.name: label
property.value: Dividends treatment for federal tax purposes.

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0179.10143] The filing has used the DividendsAxis with the member bxp:OrdinaryIncomeMember, but has used the concept bxp:DividendsTreatmentForFederalTaxPurposes multiple times on this axis with different period contexts. The concept bxp:DividendsTreatmentForFederalTaxPurposes has been used mutiple times to capture the values 3.22 and 3.04 and 2.35 for the periods 2024-01-01 to 2024-12-31 and 2023-01-01 to 2023-12-31 and 2025-01-01 to 2025-12-31. The DividendAxis should use discrete members to represent different dividend events. The same concept should not be used more than once with the same dividend member bxp:OrdinaryIncomeMember.
Rule Element Id:10143 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - bxp-20251231.htm 8

property.name: label
property.value: Dividends treatment for federal tax purposes.

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0179.10143] The filing has used the DividendsAxis with the member bxp:CapitalGainIncomeMember, but has used the concept bxp:DividendsTreatmentForFederalTaxPurposes multiple times on this axis with different period contexts. The concept bxp:DividendsTreatmentForFederalTaxPurposes has been used mutiple times to capture the values 1.12 and 0.03 and 1.29 for the periods 2023-01-01 to 2023-12-31 and 2024-01-01 to 2024-12-31 and 2025-01-01 to 2025-12-31. The DividendAxis should use discrete members to represent different dividend events. The same concept should not be used more than once with the same dividend member bxp:CapitalGainIncomeMember.
Rule Element Id:10143 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - bxp-20251231.htm 8

property.name: label
property.value: Dividends treatment for federal tax purposes.

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0179.10143] The filing has used the DividendsAxis with the member bxp:CapitalGainIncomeMember, but has used the concept bxp:DividendsTreatmentForFederalTaxPurposesPercentage multiple times on this axis with different period contexts. The concept bxp:DividendsTreatmentForFederalTaxPurposesPercentage has been used mutiple times to capture the values 0.0079 and 0.2702 and 0.3548 for the periods 2024-01-01 to 2024-12-31 and 2023-01-01 to 2023-12-31 and 2025-01-01 to 2025-12-31. The DividendAxis should use discrete members to represent different dividend events. The same concept should not be used more than once with the same dividend member bxp:CapitalGainIncomeMember.
Rule Element Id:10143 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - bxp-20251231.htm 8

property.name: label
property.value: Dividends Treatment For Federal Tax Purposes, Percentage

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0179.10143] The filing has used the DividendsAxis with the member bxp:ReturnOfCapitalMember, but has used the concept bxp:DividendsTreatmentForFederalTaxPurposesPercentage multiple times on this axis with different period contexts. The concept bxp:DividendsTreatmentForFederalTaxPurposesPercentage has been used mutiple times to capture the values 0.1092 and 0 and 0 for the periods 2024-01-01 to 2024-12-31 and 2025-01-01 to 2025-12-31 and 2023-01-01 to 2023-12-31. The DividendAxis should use discrete members to represent different dividend events. The same concept should not be used more than once with the same dividend member bxp:ReturnOfCapitalMember.
Rule Element Id:10143 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - bxp-20251231.htm 8

property.name: label
property.value: Dividends Treatment For Federal Tax Purposes, Percentage

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0179.10143] The filing has used the DividendsAxis with the member bxp:OrdinaryIncomeMember, but has used the concept bxp:DividendsTreatmentForFederalTaxPurposesPercentage multiple times on this axis with different period contexts. The concept bxp:DividendsTreatmentForFederalTaxPurposesPercentage has been used mutiple times to capture the values 0.6452 and 0.8829 and 0.7298 for the periods 2025-01-01 to 2025-12-31 and 2024-01-01 to 2024-12-31 and 2023-01-01 to 2023-12-31. The DividendAxis should use discrete members to represent different dividend events. The same concept should not be used more than once with the same dividend member bxp:OrdinaryIncomeMember.
Rule Element Id:10143 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - bxp-20251231.htm 8

property.name: label
property.value: Dividends Treatment For Federal Tax Purposes, Percentage
